lessons.title: Una mañana en Madrid
lessons.summary_en: A daily-life conversation in a Madrid café about being late, ordering drinks, and weekend plans.
lessons.summary_zh: 一段发生在马德里咖啡馆的日常对话，围绕迟到、点餐和周末计划展开。
lessons.story_intro_en: Lucía and Javier meet at a café in central Madrid. Lucía arrives a few minutes late because she missed the bus, and they start talking while ordering drinks.
lessons.story_intro_zh: Lucía 和 Javier 约在马德里市中心一家咖啡馆见面。Lucía 因为错过公交而迟到了几分钟，两个人在点单时聊起了周末安排。

characters.name: Javier
characters.description_en: He is already waiting at the café.
characters.description_zh: 他已经先到咖啡馆等着。

learning_goals_en: Describe being late and explain why
learning_goals_zh: 学会描述迟到并解释原因
学会谈论简单的周末计划
grammar_points_en: Common café pattern: ¿Qué van a tomar?
How Spanish places time and place phrases
How to express recent or past reasons
grammar_points_zh: 咖啡馆点单常见句型：¿Qué van a tomar?
时间和地点状语在西语里的常见位置
如何表达刚刚或过去发生的原因

transcript.speaker: Narration
transcript.spanish: Lucía llega unos minutos tarde a una cafetería del centro de Madrid.
transcript.english: Lucía arrives a few minutes late at a café in central Madrid.
transcript.chinese: Lucía 迟到了几分钟，来到马德里市中心的一家咖啡馆。
transcript.structure_hint_en: Subject + verb + time phrase + place phrase.
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 主语 + 动词 + 时间状语 + 地点状语。

transcript.speaker: Lucía
transcript.spanish: Perdón por llegar tarde. Había perdido el autobús.
transcript.english: Sorry for being late. I had missed the bus.
transcript.chinese: 抱歉我来晚了。我错过公交车了。
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 先道歉，再解释过去发生的原因。

transcript.speaker: Javier
transcript.spanish: No pasa nada. Yo también acabo de llegar.
transcript.english: It's okay. I also just arrived.
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 安慰回应 + 刚刚发生的动作。

transcript.speaker: Camarero
transcript.english: Good morning. What would you like to have?
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 问候 + 咖啡馆常见点单句型。

clickable_items.english_text: What would you like to have?

transcript.speaker: Lucía
transcript.spanish: Para mí, un café con leche, por favor.
transcript.english: For me, a coffee with milk, please.
transcript.chinese: 我要一杯牛奶咖啡，谢谢。
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 选择表达 + 具体项目 + 礼貌结尾。

transcript.speaker: Javier
transcript.spanish: Este sábado quiero ir al parque si hace buen tiempo.
transcript.english: This Saturday I want to go to the park if the weather is good.
transcript.chinese: 这个周六如果天气好，我想去公园。
transcript.structure_hint_en: Time phrase first + main clause + condition.
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 时间状语在前 + 主句 + 条件从句。

lessons.title: Una cena tranquila
lessons.summary_en: A restaurant lesson about confirming a reservation, asking for recommendations, ordering, and paying the bill.
lessons.summary_zh: 一节围绕订位、问推荐、点菜和买单的餐厅课程。
lessons.story_intro_en: Ana and Marcos go to a small restaurant for dinner. They confirm their reservation, ask for recommendations, and order their food.
lessons.story_intro_zh: Ana 和 Marcos 晚上去一家小餐厅吃饭。他们确认预订，询问推荐菜并完成点餐。

characters.name: Ana
characters.description_en: She wants to order soup without onion.
characters.description_zh: 她想点一份不要洋葱的汤。

characters.name: Marcos
characters.description_en: He wants to try the dish of the day.

characters.name: Camarera
characters.description_en: She introduces the menu and recommendations.

grammar_points_en: Using para mí / yo voy a...
grammar_points_zh: para mí / yo voy a... 的用法

transcript.speaker: Narration
transcript.spanish: Ana y Marcos entran en un restaurante pequeño y acogedor.
transcript.english: Ana and Marcos walk into a small and cozy restaurant.
transcript.chinese: Ana 和 Marcos 走进一家小而温馨的餐厅。
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 主语 + 动词 + 地点信息。

transcript.speaker: Camarera
transcript.english: Good evening. Do you have a reservation?

transcript.speaker: Ana
transcript.spanish: Sí, una mesa para dos a nombre de Ana López.
transcript.english: Yes, a table for two under the name Ana López.
transcript.chinese: 有的，一张两人桌，预订名字是 Ana López。
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 确认 + 名词短语 + 名字说明。

lessons.title: Una tarde en la biblioteca
lessons.summary_en: A library lesson about finding a book, asking about a quiet study area, and understanding borrowing rules.
lessons.summary_zh: 一节围绕找书、自习区和借阅规则展开的图书馆课程。
lessons.story_intro_en: Sofía and Daniel meet at the university library to prepare for an exam. Sofía is looking for a linguistics book, while Daniel wants a quiet place to study.
lessons.story_intro_zh: Sofía 和 Daniel 在大学图书馆见面准备复习考试。Sofía 在找语言学书，Daniel 想找一个安静的位置学习。

characters.name: Sofía
characters.description_en: She is looking for a linguistics book.
characters.description_zh: 她在找一本语言学的书。

characters.name: Daniel
characters.description_en: He wants a quiet place to study.
characters.description_zh: 他想找个安静的位置复习。

characters.name: Bibliotecaria
characters.description_en: She explains where the book is and how borrowing works.
characters.description_zh: 她说明书的位置和借阅规则。

learning_goals_en: Ask where to find a book
grammar_points_en: Using hay and estar in location questions
grammar_points_zh: 位置表达中的 hay 和 estar

transcript.speaker: Narration
transcript.spanish: Sofía y Daniel llegan a la biblioteca de la universidad por la tarde.
transcript.english: Sofía and Daniel arrive at the university library in the afternoon.
transcript.chinese: 下午，Sofía 和 Daniel 来到大学图书馆。
transcript.structure_hint_en: Subject + verb + place phrase + time phrase.
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 主语 + 动词 + 地点短语 + 时间短语。

transcript.speaker: Sofía
transcript.spanish: Estoy buscando un libro de lingüística, pero no lo encuentro.
transcript.english: I am looking for a linguistics book, but I can't find it.
transcript.chinese: 我在找一本语言学的书，但我找不到它。
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 正在进行时 + 转折分句。

transcript.speaker: Bibliotecaria
transcript.spanish: Puede estar en la estantería del segundo piso.
transcript.english: It may be on the shelf on the second floor.
transcript.chinese: 它可能在二楼的书架上。
transcript.structure_hint_zh: 可能性表达 + 地点短语。
